content: Phase 1: POC done (all calculations + BACEN + Excel + PDF validated)
Phase 2: Call design_agent for forensic/legal UI guidelines
Phase 2: Build backend (server.py, calculations.py, bacen.py, excel_generator.py, pdf_generator.py, models.py)
Phase 2: Build frontend (Calculator, ContractForm, PaymentsEditor, BacenSelector, ResultsView, AmortizationTable, ChartsView)
Phase 2: All user stories covered in Development
Phase 2: End to End Testing using testing_agent_v3
Phase 2: Fix all bugs reported by testing agent
